tool.name: RNAalifold
tool.description: Calculate minimum free energy secondary structures and partition function on a multiple alignment file
tool.command:
RNAalifold < '$input' > '$tabularFile'
#if $input.ext == 'clustal': -f C #else if $input.ext == 'fasta': -f F #else if $input.ext == 'stockholm': -f S #else if $input.ext == 'maf': -f M #else: -f C #end if -T$model_options.temperature -d$model_options.dangling $general_options.verbose $general_options.color $general_options.alignment #if $general_options.layout_type == 0 --layout-type=$general_options.layout_type #end if $general_options.noPS #if str($IDs.id_prefix) != "alignment" --id-prefix='$IDs.id_prefix' #end if $IDs.continuous_ids $IDs.auto_id #if $IDs.id_digits != 4 --id-digits=$IDs.id_digits #end if #if $IDs.id_start != 1 --id-start=$IDs.id_start #end if #if $constraints.maxBPspan != -1 --maxBPspan=$constraints.maxBPspan #end if #if str($constraints.constraintLocation.constraintSelector) == "fromFile" --constraint='$constraints.constraintLocation.constraintsFile' $constraints.constraintLocation.batch $constraints.ss_cons #end if #if str($constraints.shapeOption.shapeSelector) == "isUsed" #if len($constraints.shapeOption.shape_files) > 0 #set $sf=list() #for $i in $constraints.shapeOption.shape_files $sf.append(str('$i.shape')) #end for --shape= #echo ','.join($sf) #if $constraints.shapeOption.m != 1.8 or $constraints.shapeOption.b != -0.6 #set $s="Dm"+str($constraints.shapeOption.m)+"b"+str($constraints.shapeOption.b) --shapeMethod=$s #end if #end if #end if
#if $algorithm_options.pf != "-1" --partfunc=$algorithm_options.pf --pfScale=$algorithm_options.pfScale #end if #if $algorithm_options.measelect.mea == "yes" --MEA=$algorithm_options.measelect.meavalue --pfScale=$algorithm_options.pfScale #end if
$algorithm_options.mis #if $algorithm_options.stochBT_en != 1 --stochBT_en=$algorithm_options.stochBT_en #end if $algorithm_options.circular #if $algorithm_options.bppmThreshold != 1e-6 --bppmThreshold=$algorithm_options.bppmThreshold #end if $algorithm_options.gquad $algorithm_options.sci $model_options.notetra $model_options.nolp $model_options.nogu $model_options.noclosinggu #if $model_options.cfactor != 1.0 --cfactor=$model_options.cfactor #end if #if $model_options.nfactor != 1.0 --nfactor=$model_options.nfactor #end if $model_options.endgaps $model_options.ribosum #if $model_options.nsp --nsp='$model_options.nsp' #end if #if $model_options.betaScale != 1.0 --betaScale=$model_options.betaScale #end if && tar -cf '$imagesFile' *.ps

param.name: pf
param.label: Calculate partition function
param.help: Calculate the partition function and base pairing probability matrix in addition to the mfe structure.
param.option: 0: Deactivates the calculation of the pair probabilities, saving about 50% in runtime
1: Calculate the partition function and base pairing probability matrix

param.name: meavalue
param.label: Gamma Value
param.help: Tune the importance of correctly predicted pairs versus unpaired bases.

param.label: Most Informative Sequence
param.help: Output 'most informative sequence' instead of simple consensus

param.name: stochBT_en
param.label: Number of random structures
param.help: Compute a certain number of random structures with a probability dependent on the partition function.

param.name: pfScale
param.label: Scaling factor
param.help: In the calculation of the pf use scale*mfe as an estimate for the ensemble free energy.

param.name: gquad
param.label: G Quadruplex formation
param.help: Take into account G Quadruplex formation

param.name: sci
param.label: Structure conservation index
param.help: Compute the structure conservation index (SCI) for the MFE consensus structure of the alignment

param.name: color
param.label: Colored secondary structure image
param.help: Produce a colored version of the consensus structure plot

param.name: alignment
param.label: Colored and annotated alignment image
param.help: Produce a colored and structure annotated alignment

param.name: auto_id
param.label: Automatically generate an ID for each alignment

param.name: id_digits
param.label: Number of digits in automatically generated alignment IDs

param.name: id_start
param.label: First number in automatically generated alignment IDs

param.name: maxBPspan
param.label: Set the maximum base pair span

param.name: constraintSelector
param.label: Constraints
param.option: The constraints are in a separate file

param.name: batch
param.label: Use constraints for all alignment records

param.name: ss_cons
param.label: Use consensus structures from Stockholm file as constraint

param.name: dangling
param.label: How to treat dangling end energies
param.option: 2: unpaired bases participate in all dangling ends

param.name: noclosinggu
param.label: Allow GU pairing at the ends

param.name: notetra
param.label: Allow stabilization for loops, hairpins etc.

param.name: nfactor
param.label: Penalty for non-compatible sequences in the covariance term

param.name: endgaps
param.label: Score pairs with endgaps same as gap-gap pairs

param.name: nsp
param.label: Allow non-standard pairs in addition to AU, GC, and GU pairs
param.help: Comma-separated list of additionally allowed pairs.

tool.help:
**RNAalifold**
Reads aligned RNA sequences from a file and calculates their minimum free energy (mfe) structure, partition function (pf) and base pairing probability matrix. Currently supported alignment formats are ClustalW, FASTA alignment, Stockholm, and MAF.
-----
**Input format**
RNAalifold requires one input file:
- Clustal/AlignmentFasta/Stockholm/MAF file
-----
**Outputs**
- Energy of the consensus structures in the alignment - Several possible postscript images bundled together in a tar file
